review_note: March of Turin source states Berengar, king of Italy, reorganized the area into marches; accepted child span is 964..1091. Do not import until direct HRE parentage replacement/deprecation is supported.

March of Tuscany source describes it as a march of the Kingdom of Italy and Holy Roman Empire; accepted child span is 962..1197. Do not import until direct HRE parentage replacement/deprecation is supported.
Existing reviewed source supports Trent as an HRE imperial estate/state; relationship to the Kingdom of Italy is not yet accepted as child parentage and should stay held.
